title: ANIMAL CONTROL - 211info
text: ANIMAL CONTROL AND SHELTER ANIMAL CONTROL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides care and protection for homeless, unwanted, abandoned, abused, or neglected dogs and cats. Responds to complaints of stray and nuisance dogs, dog bites, and reports of animal abuse. Also offers cat and dog adoptions. 1315 SE 19th Street Warrenton, OR 97146 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 9:30am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-4pm (503) 861-0737 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 861-0737 Emergency (503) 325-2061 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clatsop County Services: Animal Adoption Animal Control Animal Shelters Cruelty to Animals Investigation If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
